name: SurrealDbKnowledgeDataPlaneV1
statements: DEFINE ANALYZER IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_text TOKENIZERS blank,class FILTERS lowercase,ascii;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_execution SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS workflow_name ON TABLE workflow_execution TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS trace_ref ON TABLE workflow_execution TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_execution_trace ON TABLE workflow_execution FIELDS trace_ref;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS evidence_manifest SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS evidence ON TABLE evidence_manifest TYPE object FLEXIBLE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS evidence.evidence_id ON TABLE evidence_manifest TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS evidence.storage_ref ON TABLE evidence_manifest TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS evidence.classification ON TABLE evidence_manifest TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recorded_event SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS event ON TABLE recorded_event TYPE object FLEXIBLE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS event.envelope.event_type ON TABLE recorded_event TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS event.payload_ref.record_id ON TABLE recorded_event TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recorded_event_payload_record ON TABLE recorded_event FIELDS event.payload_ref.record_id;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_source SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source ON TABLE knowledge_source TYPE object FLEXIBLE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source.source_id ON TABLE knowledge_source TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source.ingestion_id ON TABLE knowledge_source TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source.source_domain ON TABLE knowledge_source TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source.content_digest ON TABLE knowledge_source TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source.content_text ON TABLE knowledge_source TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_source_ingestion ON TABLE knowledge_source FIELDS source.ingestion_id;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_source_domain ON TABLE knowledge_source FIELDS source.source_domain;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_capsule SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule ON TABLE knowledge_capsule TYPE object FLEXIBLE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule.capsule_id ON TABLE knowledge_capsule TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule.publication_id ON TABLE knowledge_capsule TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule.published_at ON TABLE knowledge_capsule TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule.source_count ON TABLE knowledge_capsule TYPE int ASSERT $value >= 0;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_capsule_publication ON TABLE knowledge_capsule FIELDS capsule.publication_id UNIQUE;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_capsule_published_at ON TABLE knowledge_capsule FIELDS capsule.published_at;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_analysis SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS analysis ON TABLE knowledge_analysis TYPE object FLEXIBLE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS analysis.analysis_id ON TABLE knowledge_analysis TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS analysis.trace_ref ON TABLE knowledge_analysis TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS analysis.rendered_output ON TABLE knowledge_analysis TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_analysis_trace ON TABLE knowledge_analysis FIELDS analysis.trace_ref;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_edge TYPE RELATION SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS in ON TABLE knowledge_edge TYPE record ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS out ON TABLE knowledge_edge TYPE record ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS from_id ON TABLE knowledge_edge TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS to_id ON TABLE knowledge_edge TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS relationship ON TABLE knowledge_edge TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS rationale ON TABLE knowledge_edge TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_edge_from_to ON TABLE knowledge_edge FIELDS from_id, to_id, relationship;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_chunk SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS chunk_id ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule_id ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source_id ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS chunk_index ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE int ASSERT $value >= 0;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS title ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS uri ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS country_area ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS classification ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source_kind ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS search_text ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS content_digest ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS acquired_at ON TABLE knowledge_chunk TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_chunk_capsule_source ON TABLE knowledge_chunk FIELDS capsule_id, source_id, chunk_index UNIQUE;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_chunk_search ON TABLE knowledge_chunk COLUMNS search_text FULLTEXT ANALYZER knowledge_text BM25 HIGHLIGHTS;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_publication_status SCHEMAFULL;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS publication_id ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule_id ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS published_at ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source_count ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE int ASSERT $value >= 0;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS storage_ref ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS artifact_hash ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS version ON TABLE knowledge_publication_status TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_change_notification SCHEMAFULL CHANGEFEED 7d;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS kind ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS record_id ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS publication_id ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE option<string>;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS capsule_id ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE option<string>;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS source_id ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE option<string>;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS analysis_id ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE option<string>;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS published_at ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE FIELD IF NOT EXISTS classification ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification TYPE string ASSERT $value != NONE;
DEFINE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_change_notification_published_at ON TABLE knowledge_change_notification FIELDS published_at;
